transcript: Speaker A: Sir, main aaj chutti lena chahata hoon. [Sir, I want to take a leave today.] Speaker B: Sir, I'd like to take a leave today. Speaker A: Mujhe ek personal kaam hai. [I have some personal work.] Speaker B: I have a personal matter to attend to. Speaker A: Main apna kaam pehle complete kar dunga. [I will complete my work beforehand.] Speaker B: I will complete my work beforehand. Speaker A: Agar zarurat padi toh phone pe available rahunga. [If needed, I will be available on phone.] Speaker B: I will be available on phone if needed. Speaker A: Sir, aap se permission chahiye. [Sir, I need your permission.] Speaker B: I'm seeking your permission. Speaker A: Are, yeh toh bohot aasan hai! [Oh, this is very easy!] Speaker B: Haan, English seekhna aasan hi hai. Bas tumhein aise practice karte rehna hai aur do hafte mein tumhari English first class ho jayegi. [Yes, learning English is easy. You just have to keep practicing like this and in two weeks your English will be first class.] Speaker A: Yeh main kahan kar sakta hoon? [Where can I do this?] Speaker B: Tumhein bas SpeeX app download karna hai. Isme mere jaise AI English teacher tumhein bina judgment ke English practice karayenge aur tumhari English farratedar ho jayegi. Jaldi SpeeX download karo aur do hafte mein apni English se sabko impress karo. [You just have to download the SpeeX app. In this, AI English teachers like me will make you practice English without judgment and your English will become fluent. Download SpeeX quickly and impress everyone with your English in two weeks.]
on_screen_text: Office main kaam aane wali English [English useful in office], lena chahutu [want to take], a leave today, I have a personal, matter to attend, my work beforehand, I will be available, permission, aasan hai [is easy], English seekhna [learning English], rehna aur do hafte [staying and two weeks], me tumhari English [in your English], first class ho [will be first class], kar sakta hoon [can do], TALK ABOUT ANYTHING, Talk Now, Speak with AI TEACHER, Connecting..., Ongoing call
summary: A split-screen ad where a human speaks Hindi office phrases and an AI avatar translates them into professional English. The avatar promotes the SpeeX app for judgment-free English practice with AI teachers. The CTA urges users to download the app to become fluent in two weeks.
